text.title: BA Methodologies Detail Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying methodologies-detail. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.fix: Pick only frameworks triggered by the ask; auditor flags over-engineered packs.

antipattern.symptom: Filling out the template without the usage note.
antipattern.fix: Usage note is mandatory; auditors reject blank rationale.

antipattern.symptom: No FRS record explaining why a framework was picked.
antipattern.fix: Every framework requires a trigger entry in the FRS record.
Map framework → KA strictly; cross-KA usage requires explicit justification.
